rules.title: Entrant meets individual/team/org eligibility and exclusions.
Project created after 2026-05-19 with reused code disclosed.
At least one deployed LLM call uses the Gemini API.
At least one Google Cloud product is used.
Public demo video is under three minutes.
Repository is public or shared with Devpost judging addresses.
Revenue, costs, marketing spend, and monthly breakdown are ready.
Real user evidence, breakdown, feedback, and consent are ready.
Agent logs, API records, dashboards, and execution receipts exist.

milestones.title: Gemini and Google Cloud smoke path

integrations.name: Cloud Run, Cloud Logging, Cloud Storage
External form automation and evidence capture

dimensions.label: Business Viability
dimensions.evidence: paid pilot offer, outreach queue, proof sprint, revenue ledger template
dimensions.gap: Close arms-length paid pilots and record payment or invoice receipts.

dimensions.label: AI-Native Operations
dimensions.evidence: V CLI, Gemini provider, WAIBAv traces, VImport scrape, proof sprint renderer
dimensions.gap: Run env-backed Gemini and Cloud receipts in production.

dimensions.label: Category Impact
dimensions.evidence: founder operations workflow and paid pilot package
dimensions.gap: Show user outcomes: hours saved, submissions shipped, jobs enabled.

dimensions.label: Differentiation
dimensions.evidence: evidence ledger, form maps, automated receipts, competitor rebuttals
dimensions.gap: Make one customer case study public and redacted.

competitors.name: Vertical AI business with early revenue
competitors.strength: Clear customer pain, simple demo, stronger sales proof.
competitors.weakness: Often shallow on agent operations and evidence depth.
competitors.counter: Win by showing AI runs the business, not only the product feature.

competitors.name: Generic agent platform
competitors.strength: Broad demos, polished agent narrative, Google Cloud alignment.
competitors.weakness: Hard to prove a focused business wedge and real users.
competitors.counter: Show founder operations niche, paid pilots, and repeatable packages.

competitors.name: Proposal or grant-writing assistant
competitors.strength: Obvious workflow and buyer; easy narrative.
competitors.weakness: Mostly writing, weaker automation and audit trail.
competitors.counter: Position as execution/evidence/submission ops beyond drafting.

competitors.name: AI devtool or coding startup
competitors.strength: Developers understand it; strong technical demos.
competitors.weakness: Crowded category and weaker job-creation story.
competitors.counter: Show economic opportunity creation for nontechnical founders.

next_moves: Run the 14-day proof sprint: 20 targets, 5 calls, 3 paid pilots, 3 feedback records.
Deploy V API to Cloud Run and capture Cloud Logging receipts.
Run one env-backed Gemini call per production package and store redacted receipts.
Publish 3 redacted case studies with before/after time saved.
Record 2:45 video centered on AI operating the business end to end.

proof_sprint.name: Build with Gemini XPRIZE proof sprint
proof_sprint.objective: Turn the submission from a strong internal package into a judged business with buyer, user, cloud, and Gemini receipts.

steps.title: Send targeted founder and SMB outreach
Run discovery calls and score pain
Deliver paid pilot packets
steps.output: 3 invoices, paid receipts, or LOI evidence

steps.title: Deploy Cloud Run and run Gemini receipts
steps.output: Public URL, logs, redacted Gemini receipts

steps.title: Publish redacted case study and judge guide
steps.output: Public proof packet and testing guide

steps.title: Fill Devpost draft with automation
steps.output: Saved draft trace with final-submit gate

win_conditions: At least 3 independent paid pilots or signed invoices are recorded.
At least 3 user feedback records have permission and redaction status.
Cloud Run deployment and env-backed Gemini receipts are captured.
One redacted case study is public and one judge test guide is ready.
Devpost draft is filled by automation with a human final-submit gate.
